2603.24577.title: EndoVGGT: GNN-Enhanced Depth Estimation for Surgical 3D Reconstruction
2603.24577.paper_summary: Accurate 3D reconstruction of deformable soft tissues is essential for surgical robotic perception. However, low-texture surfaces, specular highlights, and instrument occlusions often fragment geometric continuity, posing a challenge for existing fixed-topology approaches. To address this, we propose EndoVGGT, a geometry-centric framework equipped with a Deformation-aware Graph Attention (DeGAT) module. Rather than using static spatial neighborhoods, DeGAT dynamically constructs feature-space semantic graphs to capture long-range correlations among coherent tissue regions. This enables robust propagation of structural cues across occlusions, enforcing global consistency and improving non-rigid deformation recovery. Extensive experiments on SCARED show that our method significantly improves fidelity, increasing PSNR by 24.6% and SSIM by 9.1% over prior state-of-the-art. Crucially, EndoVGGT exhibits strong zero-shot cross-dataset generalization to the unseen SCARED and EndoNeRF domains, confirming that DeGAT learns domain-agnostic geometric priors. These results highlight the efficacy of dynamic feature-space modeling for consistent surgical 3D reconstruction.
2603.24577.paper_summary_zh: 準確的可變形軟組織的三維重建對於外科機器人感知至關重要。<lb/>然而，低紋理表面、鏡面高光和儀器遮擋常常破壞幾何連續性，對現有的固定拓撲方法構成挑戰。<lb/>為了解決這個問題，我們提出了EndoVGGT，一個以幾何為中心的框架，配備了變形感知圖注意力（DeGAT）模塊。<lb/>DeGAT並不是使用靜態的空間鄰域，而是動態構建特徵空間語義圖，以捕捉一致組織區域之間的長程相關性。<lb/>這使得結構線索能夠在遮擋中穩健地傳播，強化全局一致性並改善非剛性變形恢復。<lb/>在SCARED上的大量實驗顯示，我們的方法顯著提高了真實性，PSNR提高了24.6%，SSIM提高了9.1%，超過了之前的最先進技術。<lb/>關鍵是，EndoVGGT在未見的SCARED和EndoNeRF領域中展現了強大的零樣本跨數據集泛化能力，證實了DeGAT學習了與領域無關的幾何先驗。<lb/>這些結果突顯了動態特徵空間建模在一致的外科三維重建中的有效性。
2603.24577.author: Falong Fan et.al.
2603.24577.authors: Falong Fan, Yi Xie, Arnis Lektauers, Bo Liu, Jerzy Rozenblit
